content: Pluggy provides hook specifications (extension points), hook implementations (plugin callbacks), and PluginManager (orchestration). Hookspecs define call signatures plugins implement. Plugins are namespace objects with decorated hookimpl functions. Discovery via explicit registration or setuptools entry_points. LIFO invocation order. Supports firstresult (stop at first non-None), historic hooks (call before registration), wrapper hooks (yield-based around other impls). Decouples host from plugins completely.
